products.name: Web Hosting Business
products.summary: Higher-performance hosting with more resources, staging and daily backups.
products.best_for: Growing sites that have outgrown a starter plan.

products.name: CDN + Performance Pack
products.summary: Global content delivery network and caching to speed up load times worldwide.
products.best_for: Sites slow for international visitors or heavy on images/video.

products.name: Managed WordPress
products.summary: WordPress hosting with automatic updates, caching and built-in security.
products.best_for: WordPress users who want speed and security handled for them.

products.name: VPS M (Virtual Server)
products.summary: Dedicated CPU and RAM with root access for full control and scaling.
products.best_for: Traffic-heavy or custom apps that need guaranteed resources.

products.name: Professional Email
products.summary: Business email at your own domain (you@yourbusiness.de) with 2 GB per mailbox.

products.name: Microsoft 365 Business
products.summary: Outlook, Teams, Word and Excel plus business email at your domain.
products.best_for: Teams that want email plus the full Office suite.

products.name: Wildcard SSL Certificate
products.summary: Encrypts your whole domain and subdomains; shows the padlock and builds trust.
products.best_for: Sites collecting logins or payments, or showing 'not secure' warnings.

products.name: Site Scan & Repair
products.summary: Daily malware scanning with automatic clean-up and firewall.
products.best_for: Sites that were hacked or want proactive protection.

products.name: Server Backup
products.summary: Automated daily backups with one-click restore.
products.best_for: Anyone without a reliable recovery point.

products.name: Online Store (eCommerce)
products.summary: Sell online with product listings, payments and shipping built in.
products.best_for: Sites that want to start selling products.

products.name: rankingCoach (SEO)
products.summary: Step-by-step SEO tool to improve Google ranking and visibility.
products.best_for: Sites that aren't showing up on Google.
